---
title: "Seminar Forschungsmethoden - Master Psychologie: „Anwendungsseminar Strukturgleichungsmodelle“"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly    
      dark: darkly       
page-layout: article  
---

<style>
  html, body {
    height: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  iframe {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;  
    border: none;
  }
</style>

## Zugriff
 
```{r}
#| autorun: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(qrcode)
code <- qr_code("https://kroehne.github.io/TUC-Teaching-Interactive-PRME26-MA-S01/")
plot(code)
```
  
URL: https://kroehne.github.io/TUC-Teaching-Interactive-PRME26-MA-S01
